name: API response contract & error handling standardization
description: Establish the standard API response envelope ({success, data, error, meta}) and error code registry used by all worker routes, plus the matching frontend HTTP client wrapper (fetch-based, auto-injects Authorization header, handles 401 refresh-and-retry, maps server error codes to typed errors). Backend: shared response helper in apps/worker/src/utils/response.ts, error-code constants, and an error-handler middleware. Frontend: apps/web/src/lib/api/client.ts with interceptors and typed error classes. No domain endpoints added — this is infrastructure only. Covered by unit tests on both sides.
